full_text:
Sima Fu (Shuda) 司馬孚 (叔達)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Fu (司馬孚), styledShuda (叔達), was born in Henei. Served Wei loyally to the end, weeping over Cao Mao’s corpse and refusing Jin princedom. Sima Fu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Sima Fu lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
